title: calystegia sepium var. physoides
intro: Calystegia sepium var. physoides, also known as bindweed or false bindweed, is a perennial climbing plant with twining stems and fragrant white or pink flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting relaxation. Calystegia sepium var. physoides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
